description: An attorney needs to prepare a key witness for an upcoming deposition.

nodes.task_description: Review all documents authored or received by the witness that have been produced in the case.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all relevant documents for the witness prep session.

nodes.task_description: Draft an outline of likely topics and questions the opposing counsel will ask.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed preparation outline.

nodes.task_description: Create a binder (physical or electronic) for the witness containing the key documents and the preparation outline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assembles a complete witness prep binder.
